SIRENS SOUNDS IN NORTHERN ISRAEL

data.title: Continued Strong Growth at Gilat Telecom: Net profit surged by over 250% to approximately $6.35 million
data.description: Revenue saw a substantial increase to around $75.8 million, with free cash flow rising to $7.8 million. The backlog now surpasses $52 million. The company is solidifying a strong competitive edge in the telecommunications sector and is beginning 2026 in a position of strength due to this development.

data.title: FIRST LOOK: Grand Geneva Resort & Spa’s New Short Course, Wee Nip
data.description: In Lake Geneva, Wisconsin, the Grand Geneva Resort & Spa is unveiling a new 11-hole short course named Wee Nip on May 19, 2026. This resort, known for its AAA Four-Diamond rating, aims to offer a unique golfing experience that promotes a relaxed and social atmosphere. Designed by the acclaimed Dusenberry Design, Wee Nip is crafted to be both inviting and challenging, catering to golfers of varying skill levels. The course emphasizes creativity, strategy, and enjoyment, making it a must-visit destination for golf enthusiasts. Total holes: 11Opening date: May 19, 2026Resort rating: AAA Four-Diamond

data.title: Changes in the management board of Baltic Horizon Capital AS
data.description: The management company of Baltic Horizon Fund, Baltic Horizon Capital AS, has announced updates in its management board.

data.title: Insilico Medicine and Tenacia Biotechnology Expand AI-Driven CNS Collaboration with Deal Value Up to US$94.75 Million
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on March 26, 2026, Insilico Medicine (3696.HK) - a biotechnology company utilizing generative artificial intelligence and currently in the clinical stage - has announced a partnership with Tenacia Biotechnology (Hong Kong) Co., Limited. Tenacia is a biopharmaceutical company in the commercial stage.

data.title: CPSC Posts Product Safety Warnings to its Web Site
data.description: On March 26, 2026, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) released safety warnings regarding Whomec Bed Rails, urging consumers to stop using them immediately. The CPSC emphasized the risk of serious injury or death associated with these products. Consumers can access product safety warnings and recalls at www.cpsc.gov for more information. It is crucial for individuals to heed these warnings to ensure their safety.

data.title: American tourist charged nearly $600 by Budget for returning a car early by a few hours during a two-week European vacation.
data.description: A traveler from the United States returned a rented vehicle used for a 14-day European trip to the airport earlier than expected. The price of the rental nearly doubled for this individual.

data.title: Full Swing Signs Bobby Witt Jr. and Brent Rooker as Baseball Ambassadors for New KIT Baseball Launch Monitor
data.description: In Carlsbad, California on March 26, 2026, Full Swing, a prominent sports technology company known for the innovative Full Swing KIT baseball launch monitor, announced its partnership with professional baseball players Bobby Witt Jr. and Brent Rooker. They have been appointed as official baseball ambassadors for the cutting-edge KIT. This collaboration is a significant move for the company in targeting the baseball market.

data.title: Four Champions Recognized at March for Change Congressional Reception
data.description: Today, in Arlington, Virginia on March 26, 2026, the nation's top nonprofit organization, March of Dimes, hosted the 5th Annual March for Change. This event saw advocacy efforts taking place in 15 states, alongside meetings between representatives from 28 states and Members of Congress in Washington, D.C. March of Dimes continues its vital mission to improve the health and well-being of all individuals.

data.title: CBS's "Survivor" Composer David Vanacore to Receive ASCAP Golden Note Award
data.description: Composer David Vanacore, known for scoring popular shows like Survivor, Hell's Kitchen, and Big Brother, is set to receive the prestigious ASCAP Golden Note Award. This announcement was made by the American Society of Composers, Authors, and Publishers (ASCAP) on March 26, 2026. Vanacore, who has been in the industry for 50 seasons, will be honored for his outstanding contributions to music composition.

data.title: CPSC Posts Product Recalls to its Web Site
data.description: Today, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) disclosed multiple recalls in collaboration with respective companies. One of the recalls involves Nexgrill retracting more than 10.2 million metal wire bristle grill brushes due to potential ingestion hazards. These brushes were distributed through various retail outlets and can be viewed on the CPSC website for further details.

data.title: Eurofins Viracor Launches ExPeCT™ anti-CD19 (obe-cel) CAR T-Cell Assay to Advance Proactive Monitoring in Next-Generation Immunotherapy
data.description: Today, Eurofins Viracor, a top player in advanced clinical diagnostics based in Lenexa, Kansas, revealed the release of the ExPeCT™ anti-CD19 (obe-cel) CAR T-cell assay. This innovative tool is specifically tailored to assist clinicians in monitoring the performance of CAR T-cell therapy. Through this new assay, clinicians can effectively track the efficacy of CAR T-cell therapy, which is crucial for successful treatment outcomes.
